content:
About

I'm Lisa, a Newark construction foreman. This is my parked site for Reyes Renovations, a home-renovation side gig I'm thinking about starting. For now it's where I log my own Ironbound projects.
title: About

content:
Contact

Not taking jobs yet — this is still a someday-business. If you want to talk shop or a future project, drop a note here and I'll get back when I can.
title: Contact

content:
Pricing

Rough idea of what renovation work runs in the Newark area — kitchens, baths, decks, basements. These are just ballpark notes for now, not a real quote.
title: Pricing

content:
Services

Kitchen and bath renovations, tiling, decks and pergolas, and full interior remodels across Newark and Essex County.
title: Services

content:

A gallery of completed renovations, before-and-after sets, and jobsite progress from around the Ironbound.

From the first walkthrough to the final punch list, here is how I'd take a project from idea to finished room.
title: Our Process

Who's Behind This

Right now it's just me — Lisa. 23 years in the trade and a basement full of tools. If this ever turns into a real business, I'd bring on people I'd actually trust on a jobsite.
title: Who's Behind This

Down the Road
